summary: Narrated USCIS PSA ("Who should register?") citing the Immigration and Nationality Act and Trump's executive order, opening on a vintage INA statute document then cutting to a DHS flag, a fingerprint, and a classroom under a voiceover with white caption text and an ARR logo/URL end card. It lays out the registration criteria and penalty warning. Voiceover-driven informational promo with no music or genre styling, so out of scope.
notable_text: Immigration and Nationality; by the Senate and... of America in Congress; is making sure all aliens comply; when you applied for a U.S. visa; you need to make sure they register too; ARR Alien Registration Requirement; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION
